unit.note: Combined F0 suite (shared/tests/ + integration-tests/) — 1983 passed, 11 skipped, 20 slow deselected, 0 failed. touches_shared_infra risk flag enforced the full suite. New tests: 5 resolve_main_repo_root cases, 7 decision-drop worktree/round-trip/parity cases, 1 verifier worktree case, 3 SSoT meta-tests.

integration.note: integration-tests/ ran within the combined F0 unit run above and are all green — incl. test_events_log_parity.py (cross-plugin resolver parity, the drift-guard for the refactored resolve_events_path). Not counted separately.

pgtap.note: No SQL/RLS changes — Python framework repo.

e2e.note: No web/Playwright surface — library/framework repo. The cli surface is verified below (surface_verification).

surface_verification.runner: uv run --extra dev pytest shared/tests/test_write_decision_drop.py shared/tests/test_aggregate_decisions.py shared/tests/test_events_log.py shared/tests/test_decision_drop_ssot.py shared/tests/test_verify_iterate_finalization.py -q
surface_verification.note: F0.5 cli surface — 100 tests driving the producer->file->consumer->verifier chain through real git worktrees (write_decision_drop from a worktree -> drop in the main repo -> aggregate_decisions folds it -> check_adr_in_iterate_history finds it), exit 0.
